Lucid Documentation
===================

**Lucid** is an Apple Silicon-native deep learning framework built on top of a
high-performance C++ engine (MLX + Accelerate backend). It provides a
PyTorch-compatible Python API designed for M-series Macs.

.. note::
   Lucid targets Apple Silicon only. The ``metal`` device maps to Apple's
   unified GPU memory; there is no ``cuda`` device.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Getting Started

   quickstart

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: API Reference

   api/index

.. toctree::
